story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1101_0100_20: On the day of the Arceus Cup...
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0200_10: It’s the big day! Time sure flies, huh?
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0300_10:
When people heard this Arceus Cup would
include a play, the response was
overwhelmingly positive.
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0400_10:
Yeah, and it’s starring Diantha and
La Primera!
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0500_10:
It made getting tickets a challenge, despite
our having helped with the production.
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0600_10:
Nahaha! No kidding! Then we’d better make
the most of these seats!
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0700_10:
Are you all on your way to watch Diantha’s
play?
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0800_10:
Yeah... But is it a play or a battle? I’m still
not sure what to call it!
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_0900_10:
I hear it’s a play with a serious battle
worked in!
story_arceus_10_06000/2401_1001_1000_10: I can’t wait to see Geeta act!
